description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Crowdin Upload Preparation that triggers on push to the master branch when the file libgambatte/libretro/libretro_core_options.h changes. In an ubuntu-latest job, set up Python, check out the repository with full history and without persisting credentials, run a Python script to prepare Crowdin files, commit the changes with a bot identity, and push the updated files to the current branch.
